# launchdarkly_metric_group (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly metric group data source.

~> **Beta:** This data source uses a beta LaunchDarkly API. Beta resources may change or be removed in future versions.

This data source allows you to retrieve metric group information from your LaunchDarkly project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_metric_group" "checkout_funnel" {
  project_key = "example-project"
  key         = "checkout-funnel"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The unique key that references the metric group.
- `project_key` (String) The metric group's project key.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) A description of the metric group's purpose.
- `id` (String) The ID in the format `project_key/key`.
- `kind` (String) The type of the metric group. One of `funnel` or `standard`.
- `maintainer_id` (String) The LaunchDarkly member ID of the maintainer.
- `metrics` (Attributes List) An ordered list of the metrics in this metric group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--metrics))
- `name` (String) The human-friendly name for the metric group.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with the metric group.
- `version` (Number) The version of the metric group.

<a id="nestedatt--metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metrics`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The key of the metric.
- `name_in_group` (String) The name of the metric when used within this metric group.
